global_description: A medium-sized bird with a rounded body and a long tail. It has a speckled brown and white plumage with a distinctive white eyebrow stripe. The wings and back are brown with black spots, and the underparts are lighter with streaks. The beak is long and slightly curved.

part_details.head: Rounded with a white eyebrow stripe and speckled brown and white feathers.
part_details.beak: Long, slender, slightly curved, dark in color.
part_details.wings: Brown with black spots, medium length.

spatial_relations: The white eyebrow stripe runs above the eye.
The long tail extends from the rounded body.
The wings are positioned on either side of the body.
The beak protrudes from the front of the head.
